name: Catheter Precision, Inc.
business: Catheter Precision designs, manufactures and sells medical technologies for cardiac electrophysiology, including the VIVO System (non-invasive 3D cardiac mapping for ventricular arrhythmias) and the LockeT suture retention device. The company also owns the Amigo Remote Catheter System and has interests in Cardionomix (CPNS System for heart failure) and KardioNav (integration with implanted cardiac devices). Its primary customers are hospitals providing cardiac electrophysiology lab procedures.
sellsTo: Hospitals providing cardiac electrophysiology lab procedures

exposures.sentence: Our two primary products include the VIVO System and LockeT.

The VIVO System ... is a non-invasive imaging system that offers 3D cardiac mapping to help with localizing the sites of origin of idiopathic ventricular arrhythmias in patients with structurally normal hearts prior to EP procedures.
LockeT is a suture retention device indicated for wound healing by distributing suture tension over a larger area in the patient in conjunction with a figure of eight suture closure.
Our product portfolio also includes the Amigo Remote Catheter System, or Amigo, a robotic arm that serves as a catheter control device.
On May 5, 2025, Cardionomix acquired certain assets primarily related to the Cardiac Pulmonary Nerve Stimulation ("CPNS") System previously held by Cardionomic.

KardioNav intends to integrate the VIVO mapping intellectual property with Chelak's assigned patents to develop a system that interfaces with implanted cardiac devices to enable improved pre-ablation mapping and more precise localization of arrhythmogenic tissue.
We have also adopted a holding company structure within which we house and operate our FLYTE private aviation charter business which has the potential to quickly grow into a profitable subsidiary.
Artificial intelligence-based platforms may present new risks and challenges to our business.

catalysts.event: Expected need for additional financing within 1-2 months from filing date
catalysts.sentence: We expect the need to complete an additional financing sometime in the next 1 to 2 months.

tamClaims.claim: The catheter ablation market was $3.5 billion in 2022 and is estimated to grow to $14.5 billion in 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: The catheter ablation market was $3.5 billion in 2022 and is estimated by Global Market Insights to grow to $14.5 billion in 2032.

tamClaims.claim: The ventricular ablation market is estimated to grow at a CAGR of 14.5% through 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: The ventricular ablation market is estimated by Global Market Insights to grow at a rate of 14.5% CAGR through 2032.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 6.7 million Americans over age 20 live with heart failure, forecast to rise to 8.7 million by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: In September 2024, the Heart Failure Society of America ("HFSA") reported in the Journal of Cardiac Health that approximately 6.7 million Americans over the age of 20 currently live with heart failure, forecast to rise to 8.7 million by 2030.
